response.overview: Recording artist Harmony Brown, listens to every suggestion from her record label including changing her sound, changing her look, and even changing the type of music she sang. Yet, her numbers aren't improving, and she's on the verge of being released from her contract. Her manager, suggests she returns to Atlanta and meet with a power house music producer to give her a refresh on her sound. However, she's forced to stay with and reunite with her mother, and address the trauma of her childhood.
response.title: Broken Harmony
